intro: Can You Recognize All 50 States by Their Silhouettes?
description:
A geography quiz game where you identify all 50 U.S. states by their silhouettes.

Learn state names and locations while paying close attention to each state’s unique shape.

You may think you know them, but some states are trickier than they look.

Test your intuition, build your knowledge, and see how many you can get right.

Perfect for geography fans, quiz lovers, and anyone who wants to learn while having fun.

Challenge yourself and aim to master all 50 states.

The maps, place names, and regional classifications used in this software are for learning and quiz purposes only and do not imply any position or claim regarding sovereignty, territory, or boundaries.
